display_text: Aviana's Feather. Tier 5: Provides +25% evasion and +30 movement speed. When the equipped hero falls below 30% HP, they gain flying movement. A powerful survival tool that grants escape potential at low health. Stats: Evasion: +25%, Movement Speed: +30, Flight HP Threshold: 30%.
